nasb.text: I have been in labor and hardship, through many sleepless nights, in hunger and thirst, often without food, in cold and exposure.

esv.text: in toil and hardship, through many a sleepless night, in hunger and thirst, often without food, in cold and exposure.

cnv.text: 勞碌辛苦，多次不得睡覺，又飢又渴，多次缺糧，赤身挨冷。

ccb.text: 我劳碌困苦，不得安眠，又饥又渴，挨饿受冻，赤身露体。

csbs.text: 我辛苦劳碌，经常失眠， 又饥又渴，经常缺食， 遭受寒冷，衣不蔽体。
